name: Cognitive Load Thresholds
description: Human working memory is limited. Exceeding thresholds causes immediate abandonment.
rules: If text > 250 words, implement progressive disclosure or TLDR summaries.
If choices > 4, group into categories or use accordion headers.

name: Multivariate Hypothesis Generator
description: AI must suggest A/B test variables when generating landing pages.

name: Gaze Cueing & Directional Lines
description: Users follow the eye-line of humans in photography and explicit directional arrows.
rules: Avatars/faces must look TOWARDS the primary CTA.
Use subtle SVG arrows to guide the eye down long scrolling pages.
